title: Investments
subtitle: Track US, Mexican, crypto, and manual holdings in one portfolio.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this investment? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name
form.guidanceAccount: Linked investment account balances are cash/container balances; holdings add portfolio value separately in net worth.
form.guidanceExamples: Examples: AAPL, VOO, WALMEX.MX, NAFTRAC.MX, BTC, BONOS, or CETES/manual notes.
form.guidancePrices: Refresh uses CoinGecko for crypto and Alpha Vantage/Finnhub keys from Settings when providers support the symbol. CETES/manual assets can keep manual prices or cost basis.

guidance.account: Use the investment account balance for cash or container value. Add each holding below so net worth includes the portfolio separately.
guidance.examples: Symbols can be US tickers like AAPL/VOO, Mexican tickers like WALMEX.MX, crypto like BTC, or CETES/manual instruments.
guidance.prices: Crypto refreshes through CoinGecko. Stocks, ETFs, funds, bonds, and supported MX symbols use your Alpha Vantage key first, then Finnhub. Unsupported CETES/manual assets keep the latest saved price or cost basis.

empty.title: No Investments Yet
empty.description: Add your first holding to track your portfolio.
